description: Blending classic styles with a contemporary twist, this metallic dial, large face watch is a love-forever timepiece. It transitions perfectly from day to night. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the fossil eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a steel strap Ssteele logo at the 12 hour mark Butterfly clasp with a metallic dial, black numbers and metallic hands Date aperture at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, wearable while washing your hands or in mild rain Comes in an authentic maxima collectible tin
